_comment: The Island's major biome spawn containers for randomize_dino_spawns (ADDITIONS design: ConfigAddNPCSpawnEntriesContainer adds seed-picked foreign species to each container at moderate weight - natives untouched, so every species stays obtainable and no NPCReplacements chain semantics apply). Container class names scraped from ark.wiki.gg/wiki/Spawn_entries The Island section (2026-07-15). Caves + single-species utility containers (Bee/Unicorn/Titano/Quetz/etc) deliberately excluded. habitat picks which species pool invades: land containers draw land+air species, water containers draw water species ('chaos' mode draws from everything everywhere).
